zh.lifeSummary: 當Gruffydd Maelor II ap Madog於1195年出生在威爾士蒙格莫利夏爾時，他的父親Madog ap Gruffydd Prince of Powys Fadog35歲，母親Gwladys ferch Ithel21歲。他於1243年與Emma de Audley在英國斯塔福爾奧德利結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和2個女兒的父母。他去世於1269年12月7日在英國史洛普爾盧德洛福享年74歲，埋葬在威爾士丹比爾利朗勒。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Gruffydd Maelor II ap Madog于1195年出生在威尔士蒙格莫利夏爾时，他的父亲Madog ap Gruffydd Prince of Powys Fadog35岁，母亲Gwladys ferch Ithel21岁。他于1243年与Emma de Audley在英国斯塔福爾奧德利结婚。他们至少是4个儿子和2个女儿的父母。他去世于1269年12月7日在英国史洛普爾盧德洛福享年74岁，埋葬在威尔士丹比爾利朗勒。

nameMeanings.name: ap
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Dutch: occupational name for a cobbler.
Slovenian: nickname for a talkative person, from lapati ‘to babble’, or a topographic name from dialect lap ‘abyss’. Compare Lapp 4.

variants.name: Lapp
meanings: German, English, and Dutch: from Middle High German and Middle English lappe, Middle Dutch lap ‘cloth, patch, rag’, a metonymic occupational name for a mender of clothes or shoes, or a nickname given to someone who wore ragged clothes or garments with loose folds, flaps, or hanging sleeves, or who had fleshy folds of skin on his face, neck, or body.

German: nickname for a simple-minded person, from Middle Low German lappe ‘fool’. This surname (in any of the two possible senses; see also 1 above) is also found in France (mainly Alsace, also Lorraine).
English: nickname from Anglo-Norman French lappe ‘burdock’, perhaps for someone with a prickly character.

nameMeanings.name: Madog
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Madore
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Armand, Eusebe, Fernand, Lucien, Normand, Adhemar, Adrien, Donat, Elzear, Francois, Gaetan, Gilles.
French Canadian: from a French shortened form of the Spanish personal name Amador, from Latin Amator (from amator ‘lover’), a Christian saint's name. Compare Mador .
In some cases possibly also Breton (Madoré): nickname meaning literally ‘good help’, from Old Breton mat ‘good’ and uuoret ‘help’.

nameMeanings.name: Gruffydd
meanings: Welsh: The Welsh name; from creffydd, strong faith, or strong in faith. Gruffydd, a Welsh form of Gryffydd.

nameMeanings.name: Maelor
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Name devised during the Communist era, from the initial letters of the words Marx, Engels, Lenin, October, Revolution.

nameMeanings.name: II
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

historicEvents.title: Magna Carta
historicEvents.description: King John of England agreed to a charter of rights called the Magna Carta. The document was originally drafted by the Archbishop of Canterbury to establish peace between King John and a group of rebel barons. The Magna Carta was completed in 1215 and is now considered to be one of the greatest constitutional documents of all time.

historicEvents.title: France Declares War on England
historicEvents.description: France declared war on England as Louis VIII of France attacked Poitou and northern Gascony.

historicEvents.title: 100 Years of Conflict Between England and France Ends
historicEvents.description: Treaty of Paris was signed on December 4, 1259, which ended 100 years of conflict between England and France.

en.lifeSummary: When Gruffydd Maelor II ap Madog was born in 1195, in Montgomeryshire, Wales, his father, Madog ap Gruffydd Prince of Powys Fadog, was 35 and his mother, Gwladys ferch Ithel, was 21. He married Emma de Audley in 1243, in Audley, Staffordshire, England. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 2 daughters. He died on 7 December 1269, in Ludlow, Shropshire, England, at the age of 74, and was buried in Llangollen, Denbighshire, Wales.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Gruffydd Maelor II ap Madog est né en 1195, à Montgomeryshire, Galles, son père, Madog ap Gruffydd Prince of Powys Fadog, avait 35 ans et sa mère, Gwladys ferch Ithel, avait 21 ans. Il a épousé Emma de Audley en 1243, à Audley, Staffordshire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils et 2 filles. Il est décédé le 7 décembre 1269, à Ludlow, Shropshire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 74 ans, et a été enterré à Llangollen, Denbighshire, Galles.

de.lifeSummary: Als Gruffydd Maelor II ap Madog 1195 in Montgomeryshire, Wales geboren wurde, war sein Vater Madog ap Gruffydd Prince of Powys Fadog 35 und seine Mutter Gwladys ferch Ithel 21. Er hat 1243 in Audley, Staffordshire, England Emma de Audley geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Er starb am 7. Dezember 1269 im Alter von 74 Jahren in Ludlow, Shropshire, England und wurde in Llangollen, Denbighshire, Wales begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Gruffydd Maelor II ap Madog è nato il nel 1195 nel Montgomeryshire, Galles, il suo padre, Madog ap Gruffydd Prince of Powys Fadog, aveva 35 anni e il suo madre, Gwladys ferch Ithel, aveva 21 anni. Lui sposato Emma de Audley nel 1243, nel Audley, Staffordshire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figli e 2 figlie. Morì il 7 dicembre 1269, nel Ludlow, Shropshire, England, all'età di 74 anni, e fu sepolto a Llangollen, Denbighshire, Galles.

ja.lifeSummary: Gruffydd Maelor II ap Madogが1195年にウェールズモントゴメリシュアイアで生まれた時，父Madog ap Gruffydd Prince of Powys Fadogは35歳，母Gwladys ferch Ithelは21歳であった。1243年にイギリススタフォードシュアイアアウドリーでEmma de Audleyと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼は1269年12月7日にイギリスシュロプシュアイアルドロウで74歳で死去し，ウェールズデンビグhシュアイアランゴレンにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Gruffydd Maelor II ap Madog(이)가 1195년 웨일스 몽고머이실르에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Madog ap Gruffydd Prince of Powys Fadog(은)는 35세였고, 그의 어머니 Gwladys ferch Ithel(은)는 21세였다. 그는 1243년 영국 스태퍼드실르 오들리에서 Emma de Audley(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1269년 12월 7일 영국 슈럽실르 루들로에서 74세의 나이로 사망했으며 웨일스 덴비그h실르 랭렌에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Gruffydd Maelor II ap Madog nasceu em 1195, em Montgomeryshire, Gales, seu pai, Madog ap Gruffydd Prince of Powys Fadog, tinha 35 anos e sua mãe, Gwladys ferch Ithel, tinha 21 anos. Ele casou-se com Emma de Audley em 1243, em Audley, Staffordshire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos e 2 filhas. Ele faleceu em 7 de dezembro de 1269, em Ludlow, Shropshire, Inglaterra, com 74 anos, e foi sepultado em Llangollen, Denbighshire, Gales.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Gruffydd Maelor II ap Madog родился в 1195 г. в местности монтгомиришир, Уэльс, его отцу по имени Madog ap Gruffydd Prince of Powys Fadog было 35 лет, а матери, которую звали Gwladys ferch Ithel, 21. Он женился на женщине по имени Emma de Audley в 1243 г. в местности аудли, стаффордшир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына и 2 дочери. Он умер 7 декабря 1269 г. в местности лудлоу, шропшир, Англия в возрасте 74 лет и был похоронен в местности лланголлен, денбаишир, Уэльс.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Gruffydd Maelor II ap Madog nació en 1195, en Montgomeryshire, Gales, su papá, Madog ap Gruffydd Prince of Powys Fadog, tenía 35 años y su mamá, Gwladys ferch Ithel, tenía 21 años. Se casó con Emma de Audley en 1243, en Audley, Staffordshire, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 4 hijos y 2 hijas. Murió el 7 de diciembre de 1269, en Ludlow, Shropshire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 74 años, y fue sepultado en Llangollen, Denbighshire, Gales.
